use_cases: Full-screen landing page hero with animated shader backgrounds
Product or feature showcase sections with premium visual effects
Portfolio and creative agency landing pages requiring high-impact visuals
SaaS landing pages needing modern, animated hero sections
Brand or campaign launch pages with immersive shader effects
ai_summary: A full-screen hero component featuring animated mesh gradient shaders and glass-morphism effects. Uses SVG filters for displacement and gooey effects, with mouse-tracking interactivity via Framer Motion. Designed for premium landing pages requiring immersive visual experiences with 3D-like animated backgrounds and dark theme aesthetics.
